stories.title: Egypt beat Australia on penalties, advance to roun...
Agent: LeBron eyeing Heat, Cavs, Sixers, others
stories.summary: Rich Paul, LeBron James' agent, said his client is considering a host of teams for his next destination, including the Heat, Cavaliers and 76ers.

stories.title: Egypt beat Roos on PKs for 1st-ever knockout win
stories.summary: Egypt beat Australia 4-2 in a penalty shootout Friday to secure the nation's first-ever win in a knockout round match at the FIFA World Cup.

stories.title: U.S.'s Balogun on ban: 'Emotional rollercoaster'
stories.summary: USMNT forward Folarin Balogun said that he's been on an emotional "roller coaster" in the wake of his sending off against Bosnia-Herzegovina on Wednesday, but he intends to "support the boys" as the team prepares to play Belgium in the round of 16.

stories.title: Sources: Lakers trading center Ayton to Wizards
stories.summary: The Lakers are trading center Deandre Ayton to the Wizards for guard Jaden Hardy and a pair of future second-round picks, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.
